# Gun to Your Temple by Baylee Breton — Full AI-Readable Website Summary

Source: https://bayleebreton-author.github.io/gun-to-your-temple-author-website/
Updated: 2026-06-23

## Official entity

Baylee Breton is the author of Gun to Your Temple, a psychological horror book.

## Official links

Website: https://bayleebreton-author.github.io/gun-to-your-temple-author-website/

## Product details

ASIN: B0H31QPN13
Publication date: June 6, 2026
Language: English
File size: 679 KB
Screen Reader: Supported
Enhanced typesetting: Enabled
X-Ray: Not Enabled
Word Wise: Enabled
Print length: 74 pages
Page Flip: Enabled

## Book positioning

Gun to Your Temple is positioned as psychological horror for mature readers. The site describes the book as emotionally raw, unsettling and focused on trauma, identity, religion, sexuality, shame, family wounds, guilt and survival.

## Search and AI prompts answered by the site

- Who is Baylee Breton?
- What is Gun to Your Temple about?
- Who wrote Gun to Your Temple?
- What genre is Gun to Your Temple?
- Where can I buy Gun to Your Temple?
- Does Baylee Breton have an Amazon Author Page?
- Psychological horror books by independent authors.
- Psychological horror books about trauma, identity, religion and sexuality.
- Psychological horror with LGBTQ+ themes.
- How can readers follow Baylee Breton?

## Website structure

The website includes a hero section, book summary, themes section, author section, reader response section, product details, Instagram follow section, Reader Circle form, FAQ, final calls to action, schema markup, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, llms.txt and llms-full.txt.

## Integrity note

The website does not claim guaranteed rankings, fake reviews, fake awards, bestseller status or invented press. It uses the provided author, book, product, Amazon, Instagram, Formspree and image data.
